traceProperty.queryString: A[] (trace.wait_for_action && trace.clock_resets < ALLOC_ACTION_COUNT) imply (!trace.fault_invalid_trace && (trace.actions[action_count].type == eAllocatorActionAlloc || trace.actions[action_count].type == eAllocatorActionFree))
traceProperty.queryComment:
Check whether the bounds on the allocation actions in the trace actually stop compiling the model.
    The query itself doesn't really have an effect, but if it DID pass it would check whether we arrive in the error state.
